description: Inspect files & report findings.
allowed-tools: read bash

Use inspection tools.

description: Explicit invocation only.
disable-model-invocation: true
---

name: broken
---
This skill is missing its required description.

Root body.

argument-hint: "<path>"
---
Review $1 with ${@:2}

builtinCommands.name: export
builtinCommands.description: Export session (HTML default, or specify path: .html/.jsonl)

builtinCommands.name: import
builtinCommands.description: Import and resume a session from a JSONL file

builtinCommands.name: share
builtinCommands.description: Share session as a secret GitHub gist

builtinCommands.name: copy
builtinCommands.description: Copy last agent message to clipboard

builtinCommands.name: fork
builtinCommands.description: Create a new fork from a previous user message

builtinCommands.name: clone
builtinCommands.description: Duplicate the current session at the current position

builtinCommands.name: trust
builtinCommands.description: Save project trust decision for future sessions

builtinCommands.name: reload
builtinCommands.description: Reload keybindings, extensions, skills, prompts, themes, and context files
